summary: Tested Brand Brain, Creator CRM, and Outreach Hub features (backend + frontend). All 3 new P0 SaaS features work correctly. 11/12 backend tests passed; 1 failed due to LLM timeout (Deal Terms Generator took >60s). All frontend pages load correctly with auth session injection.

minor.issue: Intermittent timeout - Claude LLM response took >60s. API returned 200 when tested manually with curl. Not a code bug, just slow LLM latency.

design_issues.screen: CRM List View - All Stages Filter
issues: Dropdown opens on page load appearing to cover first few rows - cosmetic only, closes when clicked elsewhere

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1802 lines - should be split into routers (brand_brain.py, crm.py, outreach_hub.py) for maintainability
Deal Terms Generator: consider increasing timeout on the LLM call or adding a streaming response to prevent client-side timeout

Console warning: '`value` prop on input should not be null' - there's likely a null value being passed to a controlled input component in BrandBrain.jsx (check tag input fields with null initial state)
seed_data_creation: Test session already existed from previous iterations. Used existing seeded 20 influencers, existing products (Glow Serum Pro), existing sequences (Emma Reynolds). Added TEST_BrandCo profile, TEST_Product X, TEST_Creator sequence.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (Brand Brain /brand-brain, Creator CRM /crm, Outreach Hub /outreach-hub) are functional. Auth works via session cookie injection with test_session_e2e_2025. Anton AI Agent correctly shows Brand Brain context (TEST_BrandCo) in the header. Frontend needs 8s wait after cookie injection for full load. The 'value prop null' console warning in BrandBrain.jsx tag input fields is minor but worth fixing.
rca_of_issues: Deal Terms timeout: Claude LLM API occasionally takes >60s for complex contract generation. The test timeout was set to 60s which is borderline. Not a code defect - verified API returns 200 in manual testing.
